title: Piglin Helmets Return!
description: This resource pack brings back the scrapped Piglin helmet models! The Entity Features Mod is required for this pack to wrok.
body:
Ever disliked that helmets don't fit on Pigin heads? Fret not! This resource pack brings back the Piglin helmets scrapped by Jappa because he was too lazy to make a Piglin turtle shell! This mod requires the Entity Features Mod, as Optifine does not support custom armor model.

Known Issues: This pack breaks modded armor which uses the default armor model. For this to be fixed I literally need to add a custom texture file for every single one of them, or find a way for Piglins to display the default model for non-vanilla armors.

This resource pack is created with help of JuceInUse from the EMF Discord server!
